Jinx Arcane Enemy.description: A chaotic marksman with explosive energy and a love for turning fights into chaos.
Jinx Arcane Enemy.lore: An unstoppable outlaw who thrives on mayhem and pushes every battle to the limit.

Ahri.description: A fox mage who charms targets and controls fights with quick bursts of magic.
Ahri.lore: A vastaya who walks the line between instinct, memory, and the hunt.

Draven.description: A showman fighter who lives for attention, blades, and impossible confidence.
Draven.lore: Noxus' greatest executioner, driven by fame and the roar of a crowd.

Illaoi Snow Moon.description: A brutal fighter who tests willpower and wins through crushing pressure.
Illaoi Snow Moon.lore: A prophet of the Kraken Priestess, she believes only strength reveals truth.

Sahn-Uzal Mordekaiser.description: An armored warlord who dominates close fights and never backs down.
Sahn-Uzal Mordekaiser.lore: The first death became his rebirth, and now he bends the dead to his will.

Nocturne.description: A fear-driven assassin who strikes from darkness and disappears again.
Nocturne.lore: A living nightmare that feeds on terror and stalks the edge of reality.
